title: Crypto Payment Gateways for Digital Products Explained for Digital Creators: The Honest Answer
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Kenya, you know the frustration of not being able to sell your ebooks, courses, or presets because PayPal and Stripe won't work for you. Banks in Kenya have strict requirements, and you can't afford to wait weeks for approval. You've tried every workaround, but nothing seems to stick. You're tired of being blocked from the digital economy, and you're ready to take control of your sales. But where do you start?
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Crypto payment gateways are the solution to your problem. They allow you to accept cryptocurrency payments directly on your website, without needing a traditional payment processor like PayPal or Stripe. This means you can sell your digital products to customers all over the world, without worrying about geo-restrictions or KYC requirements. With a crypto payment gateway, you're in complete control of your sales process, and you can focus on creating more content and growing your business.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

A crypto payment gateway like NOWPayments connects to your website through a simple API integration. When a customer makes a purchase, they send cryptocurrency to a unique address generated by the gateway. The gateway then verifies the transaction and deposits the funds into your account. This process happens in real-time, so you can automate delivery of your digital products to customers as soon as they pay. The technology is secure and reliable, so you can trust that your sales are safe and accurate.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Digital creators like you are built for this technology. You're looking for a way to sell your products without the hassle of traditional payment processors. You want to be able to accept cryptocurrency payments directly on your website, and you want to be able to automate delivery of your products to customers. With a crypto payment gateway, you can focus on growing your business and creating more content, without worrying about the technical details of sales and payment processing.
The biggest advantage of crypto payment gateways is that they allow you to accept cryptocurrency payments directly on your website, without needing a traditional payment processor.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration is a key component of the crypto payment gateway. This allows customers to connect their cryptocurrency wallets directly to your website, making it easy to make payments. The gateway also provides multi-chain QR codes, live price feeds, and support for 300+ cryptocurrencies. With these components working together, you can create a seamless payment experience for your customers and automate delivery of your digital products.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you understand how crypto payment gateways work, it's time to take action. First, research and choose a reliable crypto payment gateway like NOWPayments. Next, integrate the gateway into your website using the provided API documentation. Then, configure the gateway to accept cryptocurrency payments and automate delivery of your digital products. Finally, test the system thoroughly to ensure it's working correctly. With these steps, you can start selling your digital products to customers all over the world, without the hassle of traditional payment processors.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Crypto payment gateways can help you automate delivery of your digital products to customers, making the sales process more efficient and seamless.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're interested in learning more about crypto payment gateways, you may also want to explore topics like blockchain technology, cryptocurrency wallets, and digital asset management. For example, you could check out our product, Web3 Wallet Connect, which allows customers to connect their cryptocurrency wallets directly to your website. With the right knowledge and tools, you can create a seamless payment experience for your customers and automate delivery of your digital products.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with a crypto payment gateway, follow these steps: Research and choose a reliable crypto payment gateway like NOWPayments. Integrate the gateway into your website using the provided API documentation. Configure the gateway to accept cryptocurrency payments and automate delivery of your digital products. Test the system thoroughly to ensure it's working correctly. Set up payment notifications to automate delivery of your digital products to customers. Review and analyze payment data to optimize your sales process.
By using a crypto payment gateway, you can reduce the risk of chargebacks and disputes associated with traditional payment processors.
